recommendations.title: The Shack
recommendations.overview: A grieving man receives a mysterious, personal invitation to meet with God at a place called 'The Shack'.

recommendations.title: Trivisa
recommendations.overview: Hong Kong's three notorious thieves who have never met one another before appear in the same restaurant. This leads to a rumour that they are joining forces to pull off something big before the Handover, though this is not something that any of them.
recommendations.director: Vicky Wong Wai-Kit, Frank Hui, Jevons Au Man-Kit

recommendations.title: The Samaritan
recommendations.overview: After twenty years in prison, Foley is finished with the grifter's life. When he meets an elusive young woman named Iris, the possibility of a new start looks real. But his past is proving to be a stubborn companion.

recommendations.title: Turbo
recommendations.overview: The tale of an ordinary garden snail who dreams of winning the Indy 500.

recommendations.title: One Man and his Cow
recommendations.overview: An Algerian man's life-long dream finally comes true when he receives an invitation to take his cow Jacqueline to the Paris International Agriculture Fair.

recommendations.title: A Shock to the System
recommendations.overview: When experienced advertising executive Graham Marshall loses out on a promotion to a young man, he goes down in a path of vengeance.

recommendations.title: Edward Scissorhands
recommendations.overview: A small suburban town receives a visit from a castaway unfinished science experiment named Edward.

recommendations.title: One Eight Seven
recommendations.overview: After surviving a stabbing by a student, teacher Trevor Garfield moves from New York to Los Angeles. There, he resumes teaching as a substitute teacher.

recommendations.title: Midnight Lace
recommendations.overview: Kit Preston begins to unravel when she receives threatening telephone calls informing her she's soon to be murdered.

recommendations.title: Afro Samurai: Resurrection
